creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)


* deskutils/kalendar was fixed (unrelated to kf 5.91)

* x11-themes/Kvantum is fixed by doing (added to the new patch)

--- style/blur/blurhelper.cpp.orig      2022-02-16 21:46:34 UTC
+++ style/blur/blurhelper.cpp
-#include <KF5/kwindowsystem_version.h>
+#include <KF5/KWindowSystem/kwindowsystem_version.h>

* devel/gammaray and x11/radare-cutter I cannot reproduce on 14.

Will try on 13...
